mapper.select: select config_id, plugin_id, config_key, config_value from plugin_config where plugin_id = #{pluginId}
select config_id, plugin_id, config_key, config_value from plugin_config where plugin_id = #{pluginId} and config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: insert into plugin_config (plugin_id, config_key, config_value) values (#{pluginId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue})
mapper.update: update plugin_config set config_value=#{configValue} where config_id = #{configId}
